description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a light blue canvas upper and white detailing, including a distinctive side stripe and white laces. The shoe features a rounded toe, padded collar, and a white rubber sole with a slightly textured edge. The stitching is visible along the upper and around the sole, giving it a classic, casual look. The interior appears to be lined with a soft material for comfort, and the tongue is also made of matching blue fabric. The overall silhouette is streamlined, with a slightly worn appearance and some creasing on the upper. The design is reminiscent of popular skate shoes often seen in urban environments.
description: A light blue, low-top sneaker with white laces, a white side stripe, and a white rubber sole, showing signs of wear and creasing. The shoe has a classic, casual design with visible stitching and a padded collar.
description_view_0: Side view showing the light blue canvas upper, white side stripe, and white rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, white laces, and tongue with visible creasing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same blue upper, white stripe, and sole, with more visible stitching.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel, padded collar, and back seam, with the sole wrapping around the heel.
